mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_minute_data ( stock_code, trade_date, time, price, minute_volume, minute_amount, high_price, low_price, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.time}, #{item.price}, #{item.minuteVolume}, #{item.minuteAmount}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.createTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price = VALUES(price), minute_volume = VALUES(minute_volume), minute_amount = VALUES(minute_amount), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT trade_date FROM stock_minute_data ORDER BY trade_date DESC
SELECT DISTINCT stock_code FROM stock_minute_data WHERE trade_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
